journal_entry.description: Receipt of security deposit for building lease
journal_entry.rationale: Security deposit received in cash increases the Cash account (asset). The deposit is refundable at lease end, creating a liability (Security Deposit Payable). No revenue is recognized at this time as the deposit is not earned income.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Security deposit received is a straightforward transaction: cash increases (asset debit) and a refundable liability is created (liability credit). The deposit is not revenue until earned or forfeited. Monthly rent of $10,000 will be recorded separately as rental income when earned each period.
